description: Surface-neutral install, configure, test, and shared workflow solutions for supported and candidate agent surfaces. Status values are evidence-gated and do not promote planned surfaces to supported.

install.solution: Install project-local or shared Continue assets with dry-run and backup support.

configure.solution: Generate local-only Continue config from hardware-aware model recommendations.

test.solution: Use local model tests, Continue CLI checks, runtime validation, and deterministic output verification.

install.solution: Documented validation exists, but reusable Cline installation is not automated yet.
install.blockedReason: Reusable install automation waits for stable, tested Cline setup and config boundaries.

configure.solution: Surface-specific local model config generation is tracked but not promoted.
configure.blockedReason: Config generation waits for compatibility evidence beyond current validation docs.

test.solution: Use the shared agent CLI surface harness and Cline validation evidence.

install.solution: Aider validation docs and shared harness exist; reusable install automation is not yet promoted.
install.blockedReason: Install support waits for a validated package/setup path that does not assume a user machine.

configure.solution: Aider local model configuration strategy is tracked but not generated by the pack yet.
configure.blockedReason: Config generation waits for a stable, evidence-backed Aider config shape.

test.solution: Use the shared agent CLI surface harness with Aider-specific evidence.

install.solution: Track Roo Code as a candidate surface until install and config behavior are validated.
install.blockedReason: Install automation waits for confirmed command and extension setup behavior.

configure.solution: Configuration generation is planned after compatibility evidence is available.
configure.blockedReason: Config shape and local model support need validation before generation.

test.solution: Use the shared agent CLI surface harness once the real command shape is confirmed.

install.solution: Track Kilo Code as a candidate surface until install and config behavior are validated.
install.blockedReason: Install automation waits for confirmed command and extension setup behavior.

configure.solution: Configuration generation is planned after compatibility evidence is available.
configure.blockedReason: Config shape and local model support need validation before generation.

test.solution: Use the shared agent CLI surface harness once the real command shape is confirmed.

install.solution: Track OpenCode as a candidate CLI surface until install and config behavior are validated.
install.blockedReason: Install automation waits for confirmed CLI setup behavior.

configure.solution: Configuration generation is planned after compatibility evidence is available.
configure.blockedReason: Config shape and local model support need validation before generation.

test.solution: Use the shared agent CLI surface harness once the real command shape is confirmed.

install.solution: Do not automate OpenHands install from this pack yet.
install.blockedReason: Platform-style agents have different workspace, sandbox, and credential boundaries.

configure.solution: Do not generate OpenHands config from this pack yet.
configure.blockedReason: Configuration may involve platform and workspace boundary decisions outside this pack.

test.solution: Define platform validation only after install and config boundaries are clear.
test.blockedReason: Validation workflow needs a confirmed safe execution model.
